label: Databas — MongoDB Atlas
summary: Use when a Next.js App Router project explicitly needs MongoDB Atlas as its server-side database. Provides a lazy reusable MongoDB client helper and a lightweight health-check route for validating Atlas connectivity from server code only; when MONGODB_URI is missing the app must fall back to static seedData with a discreet config notice instead of crashing.
summarySv: Databas hos MongoDB Atlas för att spara och visa information på sajten. Välj den bara när du uttryckligen vill ha MongoDB; utan riktiga nycklar körs demoläge med exempeldata som går att skapa, lista och ändra, men utan delad lagring.

envVars.purpose: MongoDB Atlas connection string used by the server helper to connect to the cluster. Get it from Atlas Connect > Drivers and store it only in server-side environment variables. Tagged feature-runtime because the dossier degrades gracefully without it: isDbConfigured() gates all access, pages render seedData + DbConfigNotice, and /api/health/db returns 503.

notes: Non-relational alternative under capability 'database' — only picked on explicit MongoDB/Atlas intent via relevanceKeywords (postgres-drizzle is default). Legacy import wave 2: lazy client init (never module-level connect), dev hot-reload cache on global preserved, concurrent requests share the pending connection promise, F2 seed-fallback contract added. lastVerified carries the legacy source's date until the first preview/generate-test selects this dossier (no-false-green).
